message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.4 tick 479 — fresh-eyes review cleanups bead sync

Attaches tick-479 bead comment describing the fresh-read review pass
(commit abc8e4e5): fixed 6 clippy ignored_unit_patterns warnings in
the mid-flight tests, removed a redundant .map(|_| ()), and updated
stale check-script header comments (run count and Run 5 label).
